arts.ttl: Strasbourg predicted XI v Nantes: Andrew Omobamidele and Habib Diarra out
arts.sum: RC Strasbourg Alsace will be without club captain Habib Diarra when they travel to face FC Nantes on Sunday. The midfielder is suffering from an ankle sprain and is not…

FC Nantes welcome RC Strasbourg to the Stade de la Beaujoire for a vital Ligue 1 matchup. Nantes are currently struggling in 17th place with 26 points, just above the relegation zone, having won fiv...
